chunker.name: manual
chunker.note: Chunks are hand-authored and fixed; there is no automatic chunker. This is honest for a versioned gold-evidence benchmark: the unit of evaluation is a whole documentation chunk.

embedder.name: char-ngram-hash
embedder.note: Deterministic, offline, seedless stand-in for a real embedding model: signed feature hashing over padded character trigrams, L2-normalized. Reproducible across languages (identical FNV-1a hashing over UTF-8 bytes). It is NOT a semantic model; it stands in so the benchmark can run as a release gate with no provider or network.

index.name: in-memory-flat
index.note: Exhaustive cosine scan over every chunk (no approximate nearest neighbour), so ranking is exact and deterministic.

bm25.name: okapi-bm25-nonneg-idf
bm25.note: Okapi BM25 with the Lucene-style non-negative idf = ln(1 + (N - df + 0.5) / (df + 0.5)). Implemented from scratch identically in Python and TypeScript.

hybrid.name: reciprocal-rank-fusion
hybrid.note: Fuses the dense and BM25 rankings with RRF score = sum over methods of 1 / (rrf_k + rank), rank 1-based. Rank-based fusion needs no score normalization.

reranker.name: lexical-overlap
reranker.note: Deterministic cross-encoder stand-in. Reorders the top candidates from the hybrid list by query-term coverage plus an adjacent-bigram phrase bonus; the remaining hybrid order is preserved below the candidate window.
